name: Sampoerna Academy Jakarta

campuses.name: Main Campus
campuses.address: L'Avenue Campus, Jl. Raya Pasar Minggu Kav. 16, Pancoran, Jakarta Selatan, Indonesia

intelligence.verdict: Parents say Sampoerna Academy's biggest draw is the absence of building and development fees - a rarity among Jakarta international schools.
paragraphs: Parents say Sampoerna Academy's biggest draw is the absence of building and development fees - a rarity among Jakarta international schools.

fees.note: Approximate annual fee range: US$1.6K – US$11K. Contact the school for the full fee schedule and payment options.

paragraphs: Diverse international and local student body. Contact the school for current enrolment details.
Facilities include: L'Avenue Pancoran campus, Science laboratories, Libraries, Sports facilities, Technology labs.

metaDescription: Sampoerna Academy Jakarta (South Jakarta). Parents say Sampoerna Academy's biggest draw is the absence of building and development fees - a rarity among Jakarta international schools.…
